title: 228PCS Quick-Fill Water Balloons with Hose Nozzle, Water for Kids, Reusable, Summer Toys for Outdoor Games, Pool Parties, Family Fun
features: Ultra-Fast Water Balloon Filling: Enjoy instant summer fun with these water balloons – simply attach to a garden hose and fill 100+ water balloons in under a minute! Perfect for spontaneous water fights.
No-Tie Self-Sealing Design: Our water balloons self-sealing technology eliminates messy tying. Just fill, release, and play – making water balloons for kids ideal for kids and adults alike!
Kid-Safe Splash Battles: These water bombs for kids are made from durable, non-toxic latex, ensuring safe and exciting outdoor play for children of all ages.
Reusable & Eco-Friendly: Unlike traditional water baloons, these high-quality water bombs are designed for multiple uses, reusable water balloons reducing waste while maximizing fun.

Giant Pack for Endless Fun: Includes 6 water dispensers and 222+ vibrant waterballoons for kids, water balloons for kids perfect for pool parties, backyard games, and summer celebrations with friends and family.
